enabled.description: Whether this route accepts inbound requests

error_count.description: Total processing errors on this route

last_error.description: Summary of the most recent processing error

last_received_at.description: Timestamp of the last successful receipt on this route

name.description: Display name for this inbound route, e.g. LEGAL-MVA LeadByte Sold

receipt_count.description: Total successful receipts on this route

token_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the route token. Plaintext token is shown once at creation and never stored.

token_hint.description: Last 4 characters of the token, for display only
